---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Mnemosyne
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What limitation do you keep hitting?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or enhancement. Be specific.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Impact

Who would benefit from this? Is it a breaking change?

## Willing to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I need guidance on where to start
- [ ] Just sharing the idea
